name: Woflow, Inc.
message: Several hundreds of millions of records containing PII, transaction/order data, other internal corporate data, and a lot more (you don't want us to say publicly) have been compromised. This is a final warning to reach out by 05 Mar 2026 before we leak along with several annoying (digital) problems that'll come your way. Make the right decision, don't be the next headline. | Updated: 03 Mar 2026 | Warning: FINAL WARNING
